title: Speciality Restaurants is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Speciality Restaurants is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Speciality Restaurants is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Speciality Restaurants:
Speciality Restaurants is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speciality Restaurants!
